# VOC Report: B0FAKE1234 (US)

SENTIMENT_POSITIVE: 62
SENTIMENT_NEUTRAL: 18
SENTIMENT_NEGATIVE: 20

## Pain Points

PAIN_POINT_1_ZH: 充电口松动
PAIN_POINT_1_EN: Charging port loose after 2 weeks
PAIN_POINT_1_COUNT: 14

PAIN_POINT_2_ZH: 配件包装容易丢失
PAIN_POINT_2_EN: Small accessories easily lost from packaging
PAIN_POINT_2_COUNT: 8

PAIN_POINT_3_ZH: 说明书翻译差
PAIN_POINT_3_EN: Manual translation is hard to follow
PAIN_POINT_3_COUNT: 5

## Selling Points

SELLING_POINT_1_ZH: 电池续航长
SELLING_POINT_1_EN: Battery lasts 8+ hours on a single charge
SELLING_POINT_1_COUNT: 31

SELLING_POINT_2_ZH: 做工扎实
SELLING_POINT_2_EN: Build quality feels premium
SELLING_POINT_2_COUNT: 22

SELLING_POINT_3_ZH: 颜值高
SELLING_POINT_3_EN: Stylish design that doesn't look cheap
SELLING_POINT_3_COUNT: 17

## Listing Optimization Tips

TIP_1_ZH: 标题强调 8 小时续航
TIP_1_EN: Lead the title with the 8-hour battery claim

TIP_2_ZH: 第三个 bullet 处理充电口问题
TIP_2_EN: Use bullet 3 to preempt the charging-port concern with a stress-test claim

## Summary

SUMMARY_EN: A well-liked product carried by battery life and design; the charging-port complaint is the single biggest threat to repeat sales.
SUMMARY_ZH: 整体评价偏正面，电池和外观是主要卖点；充电口松动是最大风险点。
